what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment that points to an image asset in the design-assets channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares attachment_type 'images' and a target URI 'image://design-assets/icons/image (22)'.
The file name matches the id 'att-f51e8749'.
standouts: The target URI contains spaces and parentheses in the filename ('image (22)').
It is a metadata ledger entry rather than the image itself.
It links an attachment id to a channel-scoped asset path.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Target uses an image:// scheme to address a channel asset.
Filename is derived from the attachment id.
concerns: The target path contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing or resolution issues.
No parent message or conversation context is recorded.
No alt text, dimensions, MIME type, or file size is provided.
The '(22)' suffix in the target filename is unexplained.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub pointing to a design-assets image with an id and timestamp but little descriptive context.
questions: Which specific message or thread is this attachment attached to?
Is 'image://design-assets/icons/image (22)' a local file path, a stored blob reference, or a remote URI?
What does the '(22)' in the target filename represent?
How is the image encoded or stored?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment metadata record, which matches its apparent purpose.
intention_signals: Track an image attachment associated with the design-assets channel so it can be identified and retrieved by its id later.
novelty: The image:// URI targets a channel asset path that includes a human-style filename with spaces and parentheses, rather than a normalized identifier.
contribution: Provides a durable attachment id, creation timestamp, channel context, and a pointer to an image asset for later lookup.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry with id att-f51e8749 in the design-assets channel that references the image URI image://design-assets/icons/image (22) and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image attachment in the design-assets channel for future reference and retrieval.
